overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a rainy, neon-lit urban district at night. The player moves from a covered industrial walkway into an open plaza featuring futuristic architecture, holographic advertisements, and a prominent green-lit pyramid structure.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered industrial corridor with yellow overhead lighting and wet reflective ground

notable_agents.action: two figures standing near a railing in the distance at the start of the clip

entered.detail: large concrete and metal overpass structure with yellow strip lighting underneath
overhead strip lights emitting warm yellow glow throughout the corridor
thick industrial support pillars lining the walkway
rain-slicked reflective concrete surface showing light reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking through a covered industrial walkway beneath an overpass. The environment is characterized by yellow artificial lighting, concrete pillars, and wet reflective ground. Two figures are visible standing near a railing ahead as the player moves forward through the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from covered walkway to open plaza

events.description: exits covered industrial corridor into open neon-lit plaza area
ambient lighting shifts from warm yellow to mixed neon pink and cyan colors

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered walkway into the open plaza, approaching a fortified guard tower structure

notable_agents.action: figure walking near the guard tower entrance in the plaza

entered.detail: tall fortified concrete tower with searchlight on top
bright pink neon advertisements and building lighting
dark night sky becoming visible above the plaza

segments.scene_description: The player transitions from the covered corridor into a semi-open plaza area. A prominent guard tower structure becomes visible ahead as the environment opens up. The lighting shifts from yellow to vibrant pink neon signs on surrounding buildings, and the night sky becomes visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with futuristic architecture and holographic displays

events.description: large mech unit walks across the plaza ahead of the player
passing a structure with large burning flames emitting from the top

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza observing the neon-lit environment and passing robotic units

notable_agents.action: large bipedal mech unit walking across the plaza from right to left
futuristic car driving through the plaza in the background

entered.detail: large pyramid structure with green neon wireframe lighting and vertical beam
industrial structure with large orange flames burning at the top
tall palm trees scattered throughout the plaza area

segments.scene_description: The player explores a wide-open plaza filled with neon lighting and futuristic architecture. A large mech unit walks across the player's path, and a structure with burning flames becomes prominent on the right. The green-lit pyramid structure becomes visible in the distance on the left, while palm trees and holographic billboards populate the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: street lined with palm trees and neon-lit buildings

events.description: turns left to circle around the green pyramid structure
passing row of parked vehicles along the street

agents.ego_description: navigating the street area around the pyramid, passing parked cars and approaching a diner building

notable_agents.action: figure standing near parked vehicle on the left side of the street

entered.detail: building with bright yellow signage and warm interior lighting
futuristic cars and trucks parked along the street curb
tall industrial lamp posts with multiple floodlights

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a street area lined with palm trees and parked vehicles, circling around the green pyramid structure which remains visible in the background. A diner building with bright yellow signage becomes prominent ahead. The environment features wet asphalt streets reflecting the neon lights, with industrial buildings lining the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a vibrant, open-air urban plaza. It begins beneath an overpass in a covered walkway, moving past concrete pillars and two figures standing by a railing under dim yellow artificial lighting. As the camera advances across the wet, reflective ground, the enclosed space gradually gives way to a semi-open area. The scene then expands to reveal a prominent guard tower ahead, while the lighting shifts from yellow to the glow of vibrant pink neon signs. Finally, the environment opens fully to the night sky, transitioning from the industrial tunnel into the neon-lit expanse of the city.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic plaza that gradually transitions into a rain-slicked urban street. It begins in a wide-open square where a large mech unit crosses the path and burning flames flicker to the right, while a green-lit pyramid structure looms in the distance amidst holographic billboards and palm trees. As the camera advances, the open plaza shifts into a street area lined with parked vehicles and palm trees, circling around the pyramid as it remains a focal point in the background. The scene then opens onto wet asphalt reflecting the vibrant city lights, moving past industrial buildings on the right before finally approaching a diner building with bright yellow signage.
